event: Garden table with samovar and fruit
description: A still life showing a table set outdoors in a lush garden. A large brass samovar stands at the center, surrounded by cups, a teapot, plates of fruit, and glasses of red preserves or jam. Dense green foliage fills the background, and a bouquet of flowers sits behind the samovar. A wicker chair is partially visible at the left. The palette is dominated by deep greens with warm metallic highlights on the samovar and bright reds of the fruit and preserves.
